contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.heading: Contact us anytime
contactUs.subheading: Get the help you need, when you need it, with N+'s 24/7 support service
contactUs.emailBody:
Hello team,

I am writing to you regarding [briefly describe your problem, comment or inquiry].

I hope to count on your help.

Thank you.

text.heading: You're about to delete your account:
text.description: You will permanently lose access to all history associated with this account. You will no longer be able to use features that require an N+ account.
text.reasonLabel: Tell us why you want to delete your account:

reasons.notifications: I receive too many notifications or emails.
reasons.irrelevantContent: I no longer find the content relevant or interesting.
reasons.experienceIssue: The app experience (performance/design) does not meet my expectations.
reasons.privacyConcern: I'm concerned about my privacy or data security.
reasons.otherPlatform: I prefer using another news platform.
reasons.takingBreak: I'm taking a break and don't need the app right now.

text.deleteConfirmation: I confirm that I want to delete my N+ account

text.heading: Confirm your email address
text.subHeading: A 6-digit code has been successfully sent to your email:

deleteAccountOtpSuccess.title: Your request to delete the account has been submitted.

text.heading:
You can revoke it within the next 7 days by signing in with the same email.
If you decide to return, we're happy to have you back. Thank you for being part of our community.
